name: Punk Spy
original_name: กับ คุณชายใสซื่อ
overview:
A “gentleman” called Xin, who decided to move and stay at the resort in Amphawa to get over the fact that his father died in an accident, to learn management and to avoid bad luck.

And a “punk” called Wa, who also moved to the same resort to open a cool bar. He also can enjoy life to the fullest and get close to "him" with whom he fell in love at first sight. A romantic comedy set in a comfortable atmosphere of a small tourist town.

And this series fooled you from the first sentence…

Actually it's a story of two men who kept secrets ...

Xin was determined to uncover the truth about his father's death. Wa was assigned to pretend to flirt with Xin to steal the secret. They only sought to unravel each other's secrets. Without realizing that the true secret are their feelings for each other.

trailers.title: Pre Series Punk Spy กับ คุณชายใสซื่อ OFFICIAL นำแสดงโดย ทอมมี่ และ โทมัส
